title: Eval Baseline
description: Per-skill scorecard captured by /eval --baseline. Stored at plugin/eval/baselines/<skill>/<release-tag>.json (plugin-shipped baselines) AND at .ai-assets-memory/.committed/eval-baselines/<release-tag>.json (project-specific baselines). Used for regression detection per 02-EVAL-FRAMEWORK.md.

skill.description: Skill name being baselined (matches plugin/skills/<name>/ dir).

release_tag.description: Plugin version tag (semver) at which this baseline was captured.

tier.description: Eval tier producing this baseline. Tier 1 (linters) doesn't produce baselines (binary pass/fail).

judge_model.description: Judge model used. Cascades from rubric default; Sonnet override raises per-skill budget per 02-EVAL-FRAMEWORK.md §6.

judge_calibration_spearman.description: Spearman correlation from /plugin-doctor --calibrate-judge against known-good + known-bad samples. Threshold ≥0.7.

scores_per_dimension.description: Map of dimension name (from rubric) to score 0-5.

blind_comparator.description: Optional — present if blind-comparator ran for this case

pass.description: True if avg_score ≥4.0 AND no individual case <3.0 AND no faithfulness claim-grounding <3 (per 02-EVAL-FRAMEWORK.md §6 release gate)

score_delta.description: current avg_score - prior avg_score. Negative = regression.

tokens_delta_pct.description: % change in tokens_total. Positive = more expensive.
